title: Vendor IOMMU and NSI master metadata audit
observations: Vendor IOMMU masters are USB, CSI, ISP, VE, DE, DI, G2D, EINK, and debug, not SDMMC.
The NSI controller node has master_clks metadata, but SDMMC0 has no nsi property.
SDMMC0 has no iommus or iommu-master property in the vendor DTS.
SDMMC0 only shares the already-tested store/MBUS/MSI-lite clock group.
reason: Vendor metadata does not expose a concrete SDMMC0 IOMMU/NSI master property or gate to patch.
next: Continue to require maintainer/list/vendor evidence for any SDMMC0 master/firewall/security bit.
